title: stelis scandens
intro: Stelis scandens is a flowering orchid plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Stelis scandens can be made into teas, tinctures, or ointments, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
